featuredEvent.title: IBM Think 2026: AI & Automation Summit
featuredEvent.description: Join thousands of partners, customers, and IBM experts for the premier AI and automation event of the year. Discover the latest innovations in watsonx, Cloud Pak, and enterprise automation.
highlights: Keynote: The Future of Enterprise AI with watsonx

videos.title: watsonx.ai in Action: Building Enterprise AI Solutions
videos.description: Watch how leading enterprises are leveraging watsonx.ai to build and deploy generative AI applications at scale.

videos.title: Cloud Pak for Business Automation: Complete Walkthrough
videos.description: Comprehensive demo of IBM Cloud Pak for Business Automation showing workflow orchestration, RPA, and decision automation.

videos.title: Customer Success: AI Transformation with IBM Consulting
videos.description: Fortune 500 company shares their journey to AI-powered operations with IBM Consulting and watsonx platform.

videos.title: Process Mining: Discover Hidden Opportunities
videos.description: Learn how IBM Process Mining uses AI to analyze business processes and identify optimization opportunities.

recentWins.title: Global Bank Achieves 60% Cost Reduction with Cloud Pak
recentWins.description: Leading global bank implements IBM Cloud Pak for Business Automation to streamline loan processing, reducing operational costs by 60% and processing time by 75%.

recentWins.title: Healthcare Provider Transforms Patient Care with watsonx
recentWins.description: Healthcare network deploys watsonx.ai and Watson Assistant to provide 24/7 patient support, improving satisfaction scores by 45% and reducing call center volume by 40%.

recentWins.title: Manufacturing Giant Optimizes Supply Chain with AI
recentWins.description: Fortune 100 manufacturer uses watsonx.data and Cloud Pak for Data to optimize supply chain operations, reducing inventory costs by $100M and improving delivery times by 35%.

recentWins.title: Retail Chain Automates 80% of Back-Office Operations
recentWins.description: Major retail chain implements IBM RPA and Automation Decision Services to automate invoice processing, inventory management, and vendor onboarding, achieving 80% automation rate.

recentWins.title: Insurance Company Accelerates Claims with Document AI
recentWins.description: Insurance provider uses IBM Document Processing and Watson Studio to automate claims processing, reducing processing time from days to hours with 98% accuracy.
